title: TerrariumMarket package entry
description: Schema for entries/<name>/entry.yaml. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the submission walkthrough.

name.description: Canonical install id. 3–40 chars, lowercase letters/digits/-/_. Must match the folder name under entries/.

repo.description: Public GitHub repo HTTPS URL. github.com only for 1.5; gitlab/codeberg in a future release.

description.description: One-line listing description. Plain text, no markdown.

tags.description: At least one of: creatures, terrariums, plugins, tools. Plus freeform topical tags.

author.description: GitHub username of the primary maintainer. Validated against the GitHub API on PR.

homepage.description: Optional. Project homepage if different from the GitHub repo.

framework.description: PEP 440 / semver-style constraint on the KohakuTerrarium framework version. e.g. ">=1.5.0,<2.0.0".

tag.description: Git tag in the source repo. Semver-ish; leading 'v' optional.

commit.description: Resolved by CI from the tag. Submitters may omit it.

released.description: ISO 8601 date the version was released.

framework.description: Per-version override of the top-level framework constraint, when this release moved.

notes_url.description: Link to a longer changelog or GitHub release page.

yanked.description: True if this version is withdrawn. CLI still allows explicit `kt install @name@v0.x.y` for reproducibility but skips it in the un-pinned resolver.
